title: Bypass Stubborn Date Range Inputs via URL Construction
note: ArXiv's advanced search date range fields can be highly resistant to standard selection and typing actions. Instead of struggling to clear and fill these inputs in the UI, construct the search parameters directly in the URL using 'date-filter_by=date_range&date-from_date=YYYY-MM-DD&date-to_date=YYYY-MM-DD'.
earnedIn: Experiment A's distillation run (the original 'win' trace, MAX_RETRIES=2). Validated 3/3 on the §4.1 reproducibility re-rolls and on two held-out tasks (ArXiv--29, ArXiv--31).
fromIntents: Navigate to Advanced Search to search for articles with specific criteria.
Scroll down to see the advanced search form.
Scroll up to see the query fields.
Click the search term input field to focus it.
Click the field selector dropdown.
Click the search term input field.
Type 'autonomous vehicles' into the search box.
Click the dropdown arrow.
Click on the dropdown text box to select it.
Press 'a' to select 'All fields' in the dropdown.
Press ArrowUp to go to previous option.
Press ArrowUp to go up further.
Focus on the dropdown.
Press Home key to go to the first item in the dropdown list, which is usually 'All fields'.
Press 'a' again.
Press 'a' again.
Press 'a' again.
Press 'a' again.
Press 'a' again.
Click the 'Electrical Engineering and Systems Science (eess)' checkbox.
Scroll down to see the date filter.
Click the 'Date range' radio button.
Click the 'From' date input field.
Type the start date (yesterday's date) in the 'From' field.
Click the 'to' date input field.
Type the end date (yesterday's date) in the 'to' field.
Scroll down to find the search button.
Click the Search button to perform the query.
Scroll down to the date range inputs.
Double click 'From' field to select its contents.
Select all text in 'From' box.
Type '2026-06-25' in the From field.
Select all text in From box.
Press Backspace to delete.
Click the 'From' field to focus.
Select all text in From box.
Type the start date.
Click at the end of the input field.
Navigate directly to the search results with a wider date range.
Search for 'autonomous vehicles' in EESS with all dates to check recent submissions.

title: Counting Recent Publications via Sorted Results
note: Instead of filtering by a strict date range which can return confusing empty results, search with a broader date filter (like 'Past 12 months'), sort the results by 'Submission date (newest first)', and manually count the papers matching the target date from the top of the list. If the first paper's date is older than the target date, the count is 0.

branches.if: the results are not sorted by submission date
branches.then: Select 'Submission date (newest first)' from the 'Sort results by' dropdown and click 'Go'.

earnedIn: Experiment C's iteration 3 (§5.4). Passed in 9 steps. Iters 1 (form-filling) and 2 (url-construction) failed; the strategy-category diversity prompt forced iter 3 into a third category. fullRecordedRun.js does not auto-persist to skills.json, so this skill is curated here by hand to widen the library's coverage of the arxiv-search task family.
